adversarial_dispatches_resolved.outcome: PROBLEMATIC — diagnosis attacked successfully. Critical findings: (1) IaC source attribution wrong (FBE chart cited for eneco-vpp pod by name-match alone); (2) causal direction asserted, not earned (memory precedes CPU by 10d); (3) D-ALT-C debug:detailed exporter is simpler explanation; (4) team attribution via PromQL group_left, not CR metadata; (5) local clones 6mo stale — live oc is the only truth surface.

PROBLEMATIC — framing attacked successfully. Critical findings: F6 TERMINAL route rationalized (own rule yields HANDOVER); F1.3/F3.1 causal direction contradicted by temporal data; F3.3 migration regression (pre→post dropped spec.resources); F2.1 Rootly stock urgency-tier description quoted as team calibration.

PROCEED-WITH-CHANGES — 12 must-fix items; strongest = Check 6 HANDOVER inversion was rhetorical only (eneco-oncall-intake-enrich was never named in deliverable). All 12 must-fix items absorbed in revised rca.md per Absorption map.

DELAY-AND-FIX — 19 breaks (4 CRITICAL, 8 HIGH, 7 MEDIUM); strongest = S3-V1 scratchpad in published RCA; S1-V1 TL;DR forward-reference; S2-V3 unprobed 'vendor stock' claim. All critical+high breaks absorbed in revised rca.md per Absorption map.
